preview.prebuildCommand: npx expo prebuild --platform android --no-install && sed -i 's/gradle-8\.10\.2-bin\.zip/gradle-8.13-bin.zip/g; s/gradle-8\.10\.[0-9]*-bin\.zip/gradle-8.13-bin.zip/g' android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties && sed -i 's/-Xmx[0-9]*m/-Xmx4096m/g' android/gradle.properties && sed -i 's/reactNativeArchitectures=.*/reactNativeArchitectures=arm64-v8a/' android/gradle.properties && echo 'Gradle patched: 8.13, 4GB heap, arm64-v8a only'
